args.claim: OpenAI’s GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and GPT‑4.1 nano models each support up to a 1 million token context window, a major increase over the previous GPT‑4o limit of 128,000 tokens.
args.quote: GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and GPT‑4.1 nano are our first models with a 1 million token context window… Our previous flagship GPT‑4o supported up to 128K tokens.
